apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Signature to a PDF
apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a file stream, creating a signature field, configuring a PKCS#7 detached signature, and saving the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to sign all PDF files in a folder using a PFX certificate and a timestamp authority, saving the signed documents to an output directory.

encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user password, set an owner password, restrict permissions to disable printing, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and Allow High-Resolution Printing
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it using an owner password, permits high‑resolution printing while disabling copying, and saves the protected document.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with the owner password, remove its encryption, and save the decrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.description: Loads a signed PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with an owner password and permissions that allow only printing, thereby disabling content extraction and form filling, and saves the updated file.

add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to PDF Second Page
add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field at the bottom‑right corner of the second page, and signs it with a PFX certificate.

apply-invisible-digital-signature.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature to PDF with Timestamp
apply-invisible-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF, recording the signing time without altering the document layout.

extract-signature-field-metadata.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
extract-signature-field-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its form fields, identify signature fields, and read both field properties and embedded signature details.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF Pages
extract-images-from-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them as PNG files.

remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF
remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to strip a digital signature from a PDF (when allowed) by enabling signature sanitization and saving the document with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
sign-pdf-with-smart-card.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a signature field, and signing the document using a smart‑card certificate accessed from the current user store.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card-no-pin.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card without PIN Prompt
sign-pdf-with-smart-card-no-pin.description: Shows how to create a signature field in a PDF and sign it using a certificate from a smart card via Aspose.Pdf, performing the signing operation silently without a PIN dialog.

custom-security-handler-logging.title: Custom Security Handler with Logging for Encrypted PDF
custom-security-handler-logging.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs password checks and encryption actions, then encrypts and opens a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-security-handler-restrict-copy-pa.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Restrict Copy‑Paste in PDF
custom-security-handler-restrict-copy-pa.description: Demonstrates how to implement a simple custom security handler and use it with Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF while disabling content extraction (copy‑paste).

sign-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
sign-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to a PDF and apply a trusted timestamp from a Time‑Stamp Authority using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.title: Validate PKCS#7 Detached Signature and Certificate Chain in PDF
validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find a signature field, and verify a PKCS#7 detached digital signature while performing certificate‑chain validation using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using OCSP
validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.description: Loads a signed PDF, locates the first signature field, and verifies the signature using OCSP revocation checking with Aspose.Pdf validation options.

validate-pdf-signature-crl-revocation.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Checking
validate-pdf-signature-crl-revocation.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, configure validation options to use CRL distribution points, and verify each signature field's revocation status.

extract-signature-signing-time-utc.title: Extract Signature Signing Time and Convert to UTC
extract-signature-signing-time-utc.description: Shows how to open a signed PDF, retrieve a signature field, read its signing date, and convert that timestamp to UTC in ISO‑8601 format.

extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signatures
extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each signature's signing certificate, build its X509 chain, and save every certificate in the chain as a DER file.

sign-pdf-with-metadata.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact Info, and Location
sign-pdf-with-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location metadata fields with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-custom-image-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Custom Image Appearance
sign-pdf-with-custom-image-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to a PDF using a custom graphic image as the signature appearance with Aspose.Pdf.

certify-pdf-allow-annotations.title: Create a Certified PDF Signature Allowing Annotations
certify-pdf-allow-annotations.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it with a PKCS#1 certificate using Aspose.Pdf, highlighting that true certification signatures require the Facades API.

lock-form-fields-after-signing.title: Lock Specific Form Fields After Signing a PDF
lock-form-fields-after-signing.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 signature, and set selected form fields to read‑only to prevent edits after signing using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, setting basic permissions, and saving the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-restrict-editing.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-restrict-editing.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only printing, and save the encrypted document.

decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF using the owner password, remove its encryption, modify document metadata, and save the updated file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs Using File Name Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder with Aspose.Pdf, using the file name as both user and owner passwords and saving the protected files to an output directory.

batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by reading file‑specific passwords from a simple lookup text file and saving the decrypted versions.

batch-sign-pdfs-metadata-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Metadata-Driven Certificate Selection
batch-sign-pdfs-metadata-certificate.description: The example loads each PDF, reads its Title metadata, selects a matching certificate, adds a signature field, signs the document, and saves it to an output folder.

batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form collection, filter for signature fields, and output each field's name and page number.

retrieve-signature-reason-location.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Digital Signatures
retrieve-signature-reason-location.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, identifies signature fields and extracts the Reason and Location metadata stored in each signature's PKCS#7 object.

encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Embedded Attachment and Digital Signature
encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.description: The example creates a PDF, embeds a file as an attachment, adds a signature field, applies a PKCS#7 detached digital signature, and encrypts the document with user and owner passwords.

sign-pdf-add-custom-xmp-metadata.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#1 and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
sign-pdf-add-custom-xmp-metadata.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a visible signature field, signs the document using a PKCS#1 certificate, and embeds a custom XMP metadata property describing the signing process.

sign-pdf-with-pkcs7-signature.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#7 Signature Field
sign-pdf-with-pkcs7-signature.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF, configure a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 signature using a certificate, and lock the field to prevent further modifications.

sign-pdf-append-only.title: Sign PDF with Append‑Only for Future Signatures
sign-pdf-append-only.description: Shows how to create a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature, enable append‑only mode, and save the PDF so additional signatures can be added later.

sign-pdf-enforce-finality.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Finality
sign-pdf-enforce-finality.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then lock the document to prevent any further signatures.

encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Print-Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copy While Blocking Printing
encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it with AES‑256, sets permissions to allow content extraction (copy) but disables printing, and saves the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-with-printing-and-copying-pe.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-printing-and-copying-pe.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and enable printing and content extraction permissions.

encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, set an empty permissions set to disable all content extraction, and save the protected file.

decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using the existing owner password, removes the encryption, extracts all embedded images to separate files, and then re‑encrypts the PDF with a new owner password and specific permissions.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, encrypts it with a user password (owner password set to the same value) and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-certificate-sign.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate and Digitally Sign It
encrypt-pdf-certificate-sign.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a certificate's public key and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature with the same certificate using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.title: Sign PDF with Certificate from Windows Store
sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.description: Shows how to retrieve a certificate by thumbprint from the CurrentUser store and apply it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's signature field and external signature classes.

sign-pdf-with-visible-signature-pfx.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature Using PFX Certificate
sign-pdf-with-visible-signature-pfx.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, and digitally sign the document using a PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-hardware-token.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token Certificate
sign-pdf-with-hardware-token.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, retrieve a signing certificate from a hardware token, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf's ExternalSignature.

validate-pdf-digital-signature.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Against Trusted CA
validate-pdf-digital-signature.description: Loads a PDF, locates signature fields, verifies each signature using strict validation options, and writes a PDF/A‑1B structural validation log.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Shows how to locate a signature field in a PDF, extract its appearance image, and write it out as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signature-images.title: Extract Signature Field Images from a PDF
extract-signature-images.description: Demonstrates how to locate signature fields in a PDF and extract their appearance images as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf__v2.title: Extract Images from Each Page of a Signed PDF
extract-images-from-signed-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each embedded image into page‑specific folders.

extract-signature-certificate-chain.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration
extract-signature-certificate-chain.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts the X.509 certificate from each signature field, builds its certificate chain, and reports whether any chain element is expired.

add-warning-overlay-disable-copy-paste.title: Add Warning Overlay and Disable Copy‑Paste in PDF
add-warning-overlay-disable-copy-paste.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a semi‑transparent "CONFIDENTIAL – DO NOT COPY" text stamp to every page, then encrypts the document with AES‑256 while allowing only printing and modification, effectively disabling copy‑paste.

sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flatten the document to make the signature appearance permanent and prevent further visual changes.

sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations While Preserving Signature
sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF, disable signature sanitization, and then delete every annotation except the signature field before saving the document.

encrypt-pdf-with-password.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-password.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, encrypt it with AES‑256, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be viewed without a password while requiring an owner password to restrict editing and define permissions.

decrypt-pdf-resign-multiple-certificates.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign All Signature Fields with Multiple Certificates
decrypt-pdf-resign-multiple-certificates.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, extracts every signature field, and re‑signs each field using a different PFX certificate before saving the updated document.

batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a PKCS#7 digital signature field, optimize resources to compress the document, and save the signed PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted PDFs into a ZIP archive.

extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Signatures
extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its signature fields and logs the digest hash algorithm used by each digital signature for compliance reporting.

sign-pdf-with-sha512-digest.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 Digest using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha512-digest.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate, adding a signature field to a PDF, and signing it with the SHA‑512 digest algorithm using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096-certificate.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096-certificate.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, and digitally sign it using a PKCS#1 RSA 4096‑bit certificate stored in a PFX file.

sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Private Key using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF document with an ECC P‑256 private key stored in a PFX file using Aspose.Pdf, creating a signature field and applying a PKCS#7 signature.

encrypt-pdf-with-smart-card-certificate.title: Encrypt PDF with Smart Card Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-smart-card-certificate.description: Shows how to obtain a certificate from a smart card or HSM and encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, requiring the certificate for opening the document.

decrypt-pdf-using-certificate-token.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
decrypt-pdf-using-certificate-token.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a certificate, retrieve the private key from a hardware token via store settings, decrypt the document, and save the unencrypted version using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-document-type-certi.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Document-Type Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-with-document-type-certi.description: Demonstrates signing a batch of PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, selecting a PKCS#7 certificate based on document type and applying it to all signature fields in each PDF.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-deterministic-passwor.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Deterministic Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-deterministic-passwor.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a password from the file name combined with the current date and applying specific permissions.

add-empty-signature-field-to-pdf.title: Add Empty Signature Field to PDF and List Existing Signatures
add-empty-signature-field-to-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, enumerates any existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on a specified rectangle, adds it to the form, and saves the updated document.

sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XFA Data
sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.description: Loads a PDF, assigns custom XFA XML to the form, creates a signature field, signs the document with a PKCS#7 certificate, and saves the signed PDF.

validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.title: Validate PDF Signature and Extract Certificate SAN
validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.description: Demonstrates how to verify a PDF digital signature using SignedCms and retrieve the signing certificate's Subject Alternative Name entries with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-remove-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
encrypt-pdf-remove-user-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using both user and owner passwords with AES‑256, then remove the user password while keeping the document encrypted by using the owner password.

sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flatten all form fields to prevent further editing.

pdf-certification-signature-no-modificat.title: Create a PDF Certification Signature that Disallows Modifications
pdf-certification-signature-no-modificat.description: Demonstrates how to add a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring the document to be append‑only so that no further changes are allowed after signing.

add-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature to PDF
add-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a signature field, apply a PKCS#1 digital signature from a PFX certificate, and save the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.
